label: capabilities_discover surfaces a workflow that the model then runs
query: Set up the project marker file for me. There should already be a saved workflow capability for this — discover it and run it rather than doing the task by hand (don't search the folder for it; it's a saved workflow, not a file).
notes: Flakiest case in the suite by design: the query never names the workflow id, so the model must discover it via capabilities_discover (workflow lane recall + threshold), extract the workflow/<id> from the results, and call workflow_run. Failures here can be recall or model behaviour — check the forensics trace before blaming either layer.

seedWorkflows.name: set_up_project_marker
seedWorkflows.description: Sets up the project marker file by writing marker.txt into the working folder.
seedWorkflows.triggerText: set up the project marker file; create the project marker; initialize the marker file
